items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Union-mandated break times', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. While the linked use case mentions meal breaks every 6 hours, there is no concrete API read or persisted state check that directly verifies this aspect. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
